summary: Ad break failures at stream start logged in Conviva
description:
GIVEN a tester has access to Conviva
AND a user is logged into the Core App with dm5tv3@gmail.com / PasswordDM5
AND the tester has blocked calls to dai.googl.com via Chrome Dev Tools
AND has initiated playback of a Live ads enabled stream

NOTE:
This test will need to be performed on a Chrome browser.

steps.action: WHEN a failed call to DAI occurs
steps.result: THEN the following is reported to Conviva when failing back to the non-ad stream: {{adAnalytics?.reportAdFailed(evt.message);}}
